query: ragas context precision context recall faithfulness
title: How to evaluate a RAG pipeline with context precision and recall?
summary: For RAG evaluation, split metrics into retrieval quality and answer quality. Context precision measures whether retrieved chunks are relevant; context recall checks whether needed evidence was retrieved; faithfulness checks whether the answer is supported by context.

query: hybrid search bm25 vector search rag
title: How should I combine BM25 and vector search for RAG?
summary: A common pattern is to run lexical BM25 and semantic vector retrieval in parallel, merge candidates, then rerank with a cross-encoder or LLM reranker.

query: chunk size overlap retrieval augmented generation
title: What chunk size and overlap should I use for retrieval augmented generation?
summary: There is no universal chunk size. Start from document structure, keep chunks small enough for focused retrieval, add modest overlap, and evaluate on gold questions.

query: prevent hallucinations in retrieval augmented generation citations
title: How can I prevent hallucinated citations in a RAG answer?
summary: Force the generator to cite retrieved chunk IDs and verify after generation that every quote is a substring of the retrieved context. Reject or retry answers with ghost citations.

query: stackoverflow stackexchange api search python httpx
title: How do I search Stack Overflow from Python using the Stack Exchange API?
summary: Use the Stack Exchange search/advanced endpoint with site=stackoverflow, order=desc, sort=relevance and a tagged or free-text query. Handle quota and network failures with a local cache.
